text:
A Mutant Digimon that can travel freely between
Digital Worlds in different dimensions. This baleful
existence devours the data of Digimon in the worlds
it crosses over to, and its purpose is a mystery.
Parallelmon appears in unexpected places at
unexpected times, and its coming heralds
pandemonium for the world. As such, research teams
consider its very appearance to be a calamity. One of
Parallelmon's special moves is Absorbent Bang, which
fires a beam from its eyes that absorbs Digimon.
Anything besides Digimon hit by this beam is flung to
some other dimension. It also has Endless Trance,
which attacks unilaterally from the countless gates it
opens around the enemy.

An ultimate form of the Greymon species and
subspecies of WarGreymon, equipped with
electrical cannons. BlitzGreymon charges up its
formidable hand-to-hand combat techniques
with electricity, sending energy through even the
toughest foes with the Plasma Stakes on its arms
to destroy them from inside. The Thunder Verniers
on its back can be rotated to face forward and fire
electricity, or fired to its rear, amplifying its
propulsive power. Finally, it can release plasma
particles to form a barrier around itself with Elec
Guard.

A final form of Garurumon and subspecies of
MetalGarurumon that, unlike fellow final form
ZeedGarurumon, has taken on a humanoid shape.
Clad in Gold Digizoid armor that repels attacks,
CresGarurumon wields the Yellow Beast Crescent
Blade with excellent swordsmanship. It unleashes
Beast Cyclone, rotating its body to turn into a blade
and assault the enemy, and Fury: Ice Moon Fang,
molding ice into countless Yellow Beast Crescent
Blades to hurl at the enemy.

A new form of Omnimon, born from a fusion between
the WarGreymon subspecies BlitzGreymon and the
MetalGarurumon subspecies CresGarurumon.
Omnimon Alter-S is a different being from the
Omnimon affiliated with the Royal Knights, but the
multi-capable performance combining the special
abilities of two Digimon remains the same, as does
its strength. How the pair came to fuse is a mystery.
Did someone will it into being? Or does this fusion
exist solely because of someone's wish? The truth
of the matter is unclear.

Omnimon Alter-S uses its special move Transcendent
Cannon to shoot plasma from its BlitzGreymon-
shaped cannon. In addition, the slashing power of its 
move Supreme Sword varies depending on the energy
accumulated in the blade. Nothing exists that cannot
be cut by a fully charged Supreme Sword.

The form of Omnimon Zwart transformed into a
berserker after being infected with a virus program
by some entity. Any Digimon that crosses Omnimon
Zwart Defeat's path is viewed as a sinister foe, and
any who get close face a merciless onslaught. The
clash between the raging virus and the remnant
vaccine program inside its body has rendered it
unstable, causing it to cycle between exhaustion
and rampage while unable to heal its wounds. In
one of the rare moments the vaccine program was
able to push back enough for Omnimon Zwart
Defeat to regain its sense of self, it bound both
weapons to limit the damage it could do.

Omnimon Alter-B is a temporary form taken on by
Omnimon Alter-S after some entity had intentionally
introduced Black Digitron, a sort of ooze that turns
Digimon black, into its being. Omnimon is more
powerful in this form, but it loses itself in a mindless
rage until it changes back.
